analysis.name: Intuition
analysis.summary: TRUST近期因Binance Alpha和Futures上线、Upbit上线等利好曾大幅上涨，但当前链上流动性极低（仅71美元），且创始人曾抛售ETH套现，风险极高。短期价格波动大，不建议参与。

recommendation.invalidation: 流动性改善至百万美元级别且无负面消息

latestNews.title: Intuition's founder sold 3,285 ETH worth $7.79 million one hour ago.
latestNews.reason: 创始人抛售ETH套现，显示内部人缺乏信心，可能引发市场恐慌。

latestNews.title: Intuition (TRUST) Will Be Available on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures (2025-11-05)
latestNews.reason: 上线主流交易所增加曝光和流动性，但已过去较久，利好已消化。

latestNews.title: Upbit TRUST Listing: An Exciting New Opportunity for Crypto Traders
latestNews.reason: 韩国交易所上线带来短期买盘，但同样已消化。

fundamentals: 项目定位为L2可信数据图谱，概念新颖但竞争激烈。
总供应量10亿枚，当前流通约1.8亿枚，流通率低。
FDV约5.14亿美元，市值仅923万美元，但链上流动性极低。
曾获CoinList Launchpad支持，但无近期融资或进展。
marketRead: 链上Raydium交易对流动性仅71美元，24小时交易量仅139美元，几乎无实际交易。
价格24小时下跌3%，7日上涨4%，30日下跌22%，波动大但缺乏深度。
当前价格0.05139美元，较ATH跌91.5%，处于低位。
risks: 链上流动性极低，滑点巨大，无法大额交易。
创始人抛售ETH套现，存在团队不诚信风险。
代币解锁压力：总供应量10亿，流通仅1.8亿，未来解锁可能抛售。
项目概念虽好但落地困难，缺乏实际用户和收入。
新闻利好均为2025年11月，已过时，无新催化。
watchlist: 链上流动性是否增加至百万美元级别。
是否有新的交易所上线或合作公告。
创始人或团队是否继续抛售。
代币解锁时间表及实际解锁量。
sourceNotes: 链上数据来自Raydium，流动性极低，价格可能不反映真实市场。
新闻来源为Google News聚合，部分标题可能不准确。
创始人抛售新闻来自Bitget，需交叉验证。

profile.name: Intuition
profile.description: Intuition is the L2 for trusted data, and the world's first token-curated graph—allowing people and machines to get the information they need, when they need it, from the sources they trust. With Intuition, you can put your 'intuition' to work—transforming your thoughts, opinions, and experiences into fuel for personalized AI, recommendations, and ads that truly understand you. You fully control your digital identity and data—the most valuable resources of the digital age—enabling you to fully leverage their value while unlocking and democratizing trillions in economic potential. Bring your social graphs, preferences, and 'intuition' with you wherever you go. No more rebuilding your profile and connections from scratch on every new platform—create and curate a universal, portable identity and context that allows applications and AI across the web to understand you instantly. And as you contribute, you’re not just improving your own experience—you’re enhancing the web for everyone who follows and trusts your perspective.
